name_en: Burberry Mini Two-Tone Canvas and Leather Freya Italian-made Tote, made of topstitched leather and cotton canvas, decorated with the brand's Horseferry print. Can be carried by the top handle or worn on the shoulder with an adjustable strap. Dimensions: 23 x 8 x 19cm
